description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house with a flat roof and extensive use of glass for both windows and doors, creating a bright and open appearance. The front facade features a symmetrical arrangement of large floor-to-ceiling windows and sliding glass doors, with a central entryway flanked by a driveway and two parked cars. The rear of the house opens onto a spacious patio area with a swimming pool, sun loungers, a small garden, and outdoor dining furniture, emphasizing outdoor living. The structure is primarily composed of white and gray materials, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation, characteristic of contemporary architecture. The upper floor includes a long row of clerestory windows, providing additional natural light to the interior. The house is elevated in some sections, with covered walkways and open spaces beneath, and the overall design prioritizes openness, functionality, and integration with outdoor spaces.
description: A large, modern two-story house with a flat roof, extensive glass windows, and a spacious backyard featuring a pool and patio. The design is sleek, open, and emphasizes outdoor living.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with large windows, central entry, and a prominent backyard with a pool and patio.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, driveway with parked cars, and the pool area extending from the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the driveway, two parked cars, and the symmetrical arrangement of windows and entryway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, patio, and the house's clean, rectangular lines.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of large floor-to-ceiling windows and clerestory windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with a simple door, flanked by large windows and a driveway, no porch or decorative columns, minimalistic modern style
